Advertise Alongside These Films

How It Works

From request to campaign live in 4 simple steps. Our managed service handles everything.

01

Submit Your RFQ

Tell us your campaign goals, budget range, target cities, and preferred cinemas. No upfront payment needed.

02

Receive a Custom Quote

Our team reviews your request and builds a detailed quote with impressions estimates and pricing breakdown.

03

Accept & Pay

Review your quote, accept it, and complete payment securely via Paystack. Clear fee breakdown with VAT.

04

Campaign Goes Live

Your ad runs across selected cinemas. Track impressions, plays, and reach in real-time from your dashboard.

Why Cinema Advertising?

Cinema delivers what digital can't — 100% attention in a distraction-free environment.

Captive Audience

Cinema-goers are seated and focused — no scrolling, no skipping. Your ad commands 100% attention.

Premium Context

Brands shown in cinema are perceived as premium. Ride the emotional wave of the big-screen experience.

Measurable Reach

Dynamic occupancy tracking gives you accurate impression counts based on real attendance data.

Targeted Locations

Choose specific cinemas in Lagos, Abuja, PH and across Africa to reach your exact demographic.

Multi-format Support

Run video ads (MP4), still images, or even YouTube/Vimeo links. Full creative flexibility.

Live Analytics

Real-time campaign dashboard with impressions over time, play counts, and location-level data.

Our Locations

Reach audiences in Nigeria's major cities and beyond across Africa.

Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees. Every quote shows a complete breakdown.

Media Cost
Based on cinema, slots, and duration
Variable
Agency Fee
10% of media cost — platform service fee
+10%
Ad Conversion Fee
Fixed fee for creative processing & delivery
+₦20,000
VAT
7.5% applied on (media + agency + conversion fee)
+7.5%
Grand Total
All-inclusive
